purpose: Optional paired phase of the core 150-episode benchmark: deterministic scripted-language feedback (hard-coded timestamps, no provider). Each episode replays its frozen geometry and fires predeclared instructions at fixed simulation times.

script.instruction: Watch out! I think it's going to crash soon.

notes: Instruction strings are provenance labels only; the gamma mapping is hard-coded from the historical discrete vocabulary {0.07, 0.03} (registry 3.3). No LLM is called.
feedback_intervention_time_s comes from the frozen LHC instances (already hashed); offsets are declared here, so the whole schedule is deterministic.
response_latency_s=0.0 is the idealized scripted bound; provider-latency emulation would be a separate profile version.
Paired analysis per docs/SAFE_PANDA_CORE_SCENARIO_PLAN.md: exact McNemar per family, Holm across the three families, effect sizes with intervals.
